items.text: Auto-estimate commute times via OSRM routing

Crisis reassess preserves completed steps and only regenerates remaining work
Crisis mode urgency detection, multi-crisis awareness, and reassess button

Polish dashboard and weekly calendar views

Resolve time anchor hydration mismatch and label day progress bar

ADHD audit improvements — reduced motion, daily momentum, task breakdown, time anchor

Add 7 new MCP tools — goals CRUD, event update/delete, brain dump list, task search

Expandable notification bell + docs update for changelog and notifications
